data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Post-experience photo sharing', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented through an API or any other means. While the linked use case mentions that photos are shared to a group album post-tour, there is no concrete evidence of an API endpoint or functionality that supports this feature. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an API or functionality for post-experience photo sharing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the post-experience photo sharing requirement.
